name: ai-assistant-mvp
description: AI Assistant MVP with multi-model support and tool calling

scripts.copy-assets: cp -r src/runtime/prompts dist/runtime/prompts && cp -r src/runtime/skills dist/runtime/skills
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run ui:build
scripts.gateway:dev: npm run build && npm run ui:build && node dist/index.js

_piAgentDependencies_NOTE: These packages are the official Pi Agent Runtime ecosystem from the OpenPilot project. Install them when switching from local shim (MODE A) to real packages (MODE B) in src/pi-agent/index.ts. Real imports: AgentTool/AgentToolResult from pi-agent-core, AgentSession/ToolDefinition from pi-coding-agent.
